---
title: "EMW"
output:
  html_document:
    fig_width: 1
include: 
  - .img-circle {border-radius: 50%;}
---

<style>
  .title{
    display: none;
  }
</style>

<style>
.column-left{
  float: left;
  width: 40%;
  text-align: center;
}
.column-main{
  display: inline-block;
  width: 60%;
  text-align: left;
}
</style>


<br>
<br>


<div class="column-left">

<img src="emily_square.jpg" alt="Emily Malcolm-White headshot" align="middle" class="img-circle" width="200" height="200" style=" margin: 20px 20px 20px 20px;">

**Emily Malcolm-White** (she/her)\
Faculty\
Department of Mathematics & Statistics\
Middlebury College\
<i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> <a href = "mailto: emalcolmwhite@middlebury.edu"> emalcolmwhite@middlebury.edu </a>\
WNS 215
</div>

<div class="column-main">

**Hi! I'm Emily Malcolm-White.**  I am an educator and student support specialist with a love for developing and teaching mathematics, statistics, and data science courses.

I believe that STEM education should be inclusive and accessible for all. I hope to minimize barriers for all students, including those with varying academic backgrounds, those with responsibilities outside of academics, and those with disabilities. I take the time to learn about innovative and effective teaching pedagogy and like to keep trying new things to maximize my effectiveness as an instructor. 

I am currently Faculty in Mathematics and Statistics at Middlebury College where on focus on teaching introductory mathematics, statistics, and data science courses. I have a Bachelor of Science in Applied Mathematics and Statistics from the University of Guelph and a Masters of Science in Statistics from the University of Victoria. 

In Fall 2023, I will be teaching MATH 118 (Intro to Data Science), MATH 116 (Intro to Statistics Science), and MATH 211 (Regression).

<div class="btn-group" role="group" aria-label="Links">
  <a role="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" href="EMW_CV.pdf">View CV</a>
</div>
